title: platanthera horsfieldii
intro: Platanthera horsfieldii, also known as Horsfield's orchid, is a species of orchid found in East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Platanthera horsfieldii include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
